description: Driftless is a workspace for teams and AI agents to manage shared context, projects, and operational records. It lets humans and agents read and write the same knowledge and work surfaces through web, CLI, API, and MCP interfaces.
summary: Driftless exposes a REST API at https://api.driftless.icu/api/v1, a streamable-HTTP MCP server at https://api.driftless.icu/mcp, and the `driftless` npm CLI; the REST API and CLI use workspace API keys, while the MCP server supports either API-key headers or OAuth 2.0 with dynamic client registration.
